MoBA: Mixture of Block Attention

Interactive block routing — click any block or drag the slider to move the query position.
Top-2 blocks are selected by gate score; the current block is always active.

Block sequence (10 blocks · 64 tokens each)
Gate scores s_i = q · mean_pool(K[block_i])
Query position: Block 1
k = 2
s_i = q · mean_pool(K[block_i])
select top-k + always B_current
Routing is content-dependent, not positional — different queries activate different block subsets.
Training: 90% MoBA + 10% full attention · Sparsity @32K: 95.31% · Prefill @1M: 6.5× faster
Current block (always active — analogous to MoE shared expert)
Top-k selected by gate score
Not selected (evicted — ~95% of blocks)
